evals.prompt: My product pages don't show rich results in Google. The Lighthouse SEO score is 72.
evals.expected_output: Diagnoses missing Product structured data and meta tag issues, implements fixes
expectations: Checks for existing structured data (JSON-LD scripts)
Adds Product + Offer schema with price, currency, availability, sku
Verifies generateMetadata exports unique title and description per product
Checks for canonical URLs on product pages
Checks heading hierarchy (single H1 per page)
Checks all images have alt text
Recommends validation via Google Rich Results Test
